word: G2007 - ἐπιτίθημι - epitíthēmi - ep-ee-tith'-ay-mee - Add unto

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιτίθημι

- Transliteration: Epitithemi

- Phonetic: ep-ee-tith'-ay-mee

- Definition:

1. in the active voice

a. to put or lay upon

b. to add to

2. in the middle voice

a. to have put on, bid to be laid on

b. to lay or throw one's self upon

c. to attack one, to make an assault on one

- Origin: from G1909 and G5087

- TDNT entry: 10:39,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G5087; to impose (in a friendly or hostile sense): - add unto lade lay upon put (up) on set on (up) + surname X wound.
